overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through a sunlit vineyard. The character passes a guard NPC and continues through lush countryside with mountains in the background, featuring warm golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: vineyard hillside path with distant lake view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the vineyard with swords on back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the vineyard
wooden posts supporting grape vines along the path
blue lake visible in the valley between hills
green leafy trees dotting the hillside
red flowers growing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit dirt path through a vineyard, with wooden posts lining the right side and a distant lake visible to the left. The landscape features rolling hills, scattered trees, and red poppies growing wild along the trail.

events.description: guard NPC becomes visible standing on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, approaching and passing a guard standing on the right

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing still holding a halberd, watching the path

entered.detail: stack of wooden barrels near the guard post
stone tower or castle visible on the distant hilltop

segments.scene_description: As Geralt continues walking, a guard in armor holding a halberd comes into view standing beside wooden barrels on the right. The distant lake disappears from view as the path curves, revealing a stone castle tower on the distant hill.

events.description: passing the guard and entering a more densely vegetated section of the path
wooden cart becomes visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking past the guard and continuing through denser foliage along the winding path

entered.detail: covered wooden cart parked beside the path
thick green bushes and trees creating a semi-enclosed feel

segments.scene_description: After passing the guard, the path continues through denser vegetation with thick bushes lining the left side. A wooden cart appears parked on the right, and the castle tower remains visible in the distance as the trail winds through the lush countryside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit dirt path that transitions from an open vineyard into a lush, enclosed countryside. It begins with Geralt walking past wooden posts and wild red poppies, with a distant lake visible across the rolling hills to the left. As the path curves, the lake disappears from view and the camera reveals a guard in armor standing by wooden barrels, while a stone castle tower emerges on a distant hill. The scene then shifts into denser vegetation with thick bushes lining the trail before passing a parked wooden cart. Finally, the camera continues to follow the winding path through the greenery, keeping the distant castle tower in sight against the horizon.
